ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete's coach */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or club the athlete represents */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the athlete's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the athlete */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* The athlete's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL to the country's official Olympic team website */,
  "olympic_history" TEXT /* A brief history of the country's participation in the Olympics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "olympic_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Olympic Game */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the Olympic Game */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the Olympic Game was held */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the Olympic Game (Summer or Winter) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the Olympic Games */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the Olympic Games */,
  "total_medals_awarded" INTEGER /* Total number of medals awarded in the games */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL to the official website of the Olympic Games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport to which the event belongs */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender category for the event */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the sprinting event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the event */,
  "event_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the event's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Olympic Game */,
  "medal" TEXT /* Medal won by the athlete */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken by the athlete to complete the event */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the medal */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* The reaction time of the athlete at the start */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* JSON object containing split times for the event */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* The wind speed during the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the event */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES olympic_games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "best_time" REAL /* Best time achieved by the athlete */,
  "average_time" REAL /* Average time of the athlete */,
  "personal_records" TEXT /* Personal records of the athlete */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* The year the athlete started their professional career */,
  "career_highlights" TEXT /* A brief summary of the athlete's career highlights */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* A brief summary of any significant injuries */,
  "training_regimen" TEXT /* A brief description of the athlete's training regimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_stats_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "world_record" REAL /* World record for the event */,
  "olympic_record" REAL /* Olympic record for the event */,
  "record_holder_name" TEXT /* The name of the athlete holding the record */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* The date the record was set */,
  "record_location" TEXT /* The location where the record was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_records_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
